title: Microsoft Just Shocked The Entire AI World: 7 New AI Models
summary: Microsoft revealed seven new AI models including MAI-Thinking-1, Scout, MDASH, and Majorana 2, expanding its full-stack AI capabilities. The move positions Microsoft to compete directly with OpenAI and Google while maintaining its partnership status.
